sections.paragraph: ϑλῖψις, εως, ἡ [θλίβω; ‘pressing, pressure’] in NT metaph. sense ‘distress that is the result of outward circumstances’, distress, suffering Mt 24:9 (suffering caused by brutal physical abuse), 21; Ac 11:19; Ro 12:12; 2 Cor 4:17; Col 1:24; 2 Th 1:6; Hb 10:33; Rv 2:9, 22; 7:14. W. focus on inward anguish, trouble, distress 2 Cor 2:4; Phil 1:17.
